title: Only home remaining in abandoned UK village hits the market for £35,000 - after 93 houses were demolished due to fears of a deadly landslide caused by 'moving mountain'
description: Up to 600 residents in Troedrhiwfuwch, near Caerphilly, Wales, were evacuated from their homes in the mid-1980s.
content:
The final home left in an abandoned UK village where 93 houses were demolished due to fears of a deadly landslide has hit the market for just £35,000.
Up to 600 residents in Troedrhiwfuwch, near Cae… [+5980 chars]
de: Das einzige verbliebene Haus in einem verlassenen britischen Dorf kommt für 35.000 Pfund auf den Markt – nachdem 93 Häuser aus Angst vor einem tödlichen Erdrutsch durch „Bergverlagerung“ abgerissen wurden. Bis zu 600 Einwohner in Troedrhiwfuwch, in der Nähe von Caerphilly, Wales, wurden Mitte der 1980er Jahre aus ihren Häusern evakuiert.
en: Only home remaining in abandoned UK village hits the market for £35,000 - after 93 houses were demolished due to fears of a deadly landslide caused by 'moving mountain'. Up to 600 residents in Troedrhiwfuwch, near Caerphilly, Wales, were evacuated from their homes in the mid-1980s.
la: Sola domus remanens in villa relicta UK mercatum pro £35,000 pervenit - postquam 93 aedes eversae sunt propter metum ruinae fatalis per 'montem moventem'. Usque ad 600 incolas Troedrhiwfuwch, prope Caerphilly, Walliam, e sedibus in medio 1980s excesserant.
